final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: brand-advertising
Asset type: mobile full-screen splash ad, 9:16 vertical format
Primary request: OPPO Find X9 Yta new product launch announcement, brand exposure prioritized, high visual impact
Scene/backdrop: clean minimal studio backdrop with subtle gradient, space for product showcase
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Yta smartphone, sleek modern design, flagship positioning
Style/medium: premium commercial product photography, high-end brand advertising aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered hero product shot, vertical 9:16 ratio optimized for mobile screens
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with soft highlights, premium and aspirational mood
Color palette: OPPO brand colors, sleek metallic tones, deep blacks, accent highlights
Materials/textures: brushed metal finish, glass reflections, premium tactile surfaces
Text (verbatim): "OPPO丰机截屏，网发布的OPPQ）FindX9Yta全屏新品牌窗厂告"
Constraints: 1080×1920 resolution, brand exposure as priority, visual impact first, full-screen mobile format
Avoid: cluttered composition, low contrast, amateur lighting, watermark, text legibility issues
